top_signals.title: SpaceX Demand Is 'Off the Charts,' Says Schwab CEO
top_signals.summary: Charles Schwab had one of the five busiest trading days ever when SpaceX made its stock-market debut last week. “If you think about all the market events we’ve had over those 50 years, for the IPO to crack the top five is pretty unbelievable,” Schwab Chief Executive Officer Rick Wurster said Thursday on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

alerts.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
alerts.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
